name: 12" x 6" x 4" All Purpose Storage 1/2 Storage Bin - Brightroom™: Clear Plastic Decorative Container, No Assembly Required
description:
It's easy to keep the smaller items in your home organized with the 12 x 6 x 4 All-Purpose 1/2 Storage Bin from Brightroom™. This plastic storage bin is a great size to hold smaller items like spice jars, office supplies, pill bottles or toiletries, letting you easily organize any space in your home, from the kitchen to your home office to the medicine cabinet. The bin has a stackable design so you can combine several to best suit your organizational needs, and a clear construction lets you see its contents at a glance for added convenience.

Brightroom™ started with a simple truth: When you’ve got it together, you feel better. Our versatile designs reveal the possibility in every closet, cupboard and drawer, and work together to create brilliant ways to organize your every day.

Storage Bin Dimension: 6''L x 12''W x 4''H

Top width: 11.65 inch
Bottom width: 12 inch
Interior height: 3.7inch
Interior width: 11.58 inch
Interior length: 5.58 inch
